title: Mini Build
description: a 16x resource pack that allows you to build miniature cities !
body:
## About

Mini Build lets you create miniature towns by replacing the texture of certain blocks with miniature facades, roofs, roads and plants ! So far, this pack contains 50 facade textures, 11 roof textures, 3 tree textures and 2 road texture.

This texture pack is far from finished, as I plan to add more architectural styles and new textures over time.



## Modified blocks list
### Building textures :

**Old buildings :**
- planks and slabs : acacia, bamboo, bamboo mosic, birch and oak
- sand : red sand, sand and suspicious sand
- terracotta : red, orange,  light gray and white
- glazed terracotta : brown, lime, orange, pink
- concrete powder : light blue, orange
- bone block
- bricks
- sandstone

**Modern buildings :**
- concrete blocks : black, blue, brown, cyan, gray, light gray, white, yellow and red
- concrete powder : black, blue, brown, cyan, gray, light gray, red and white
- terracota : basic and brown terracota
- quartz : pillar, bricks and chiseled block
- red sandstone
- birch log
- brown mushroom block
- mushroom stem
- calcite
- polished diorite
- white glazed terracotta

### Roof textures :
- black, cyan, light blue, gray, brown, red, orange, white, green, light grey and lime wool

### Road texture :
- dark oak and acacia log

### Tree textures :
- allium, dandelion and lilac



## Warning

This texture pack is for construction only, not for play ! I also recommend using it in a superflat world.

Lastly, I recommend always placing glazed terracotta between two other buildings, as their texture changes rotation from one side to the other.
